Diyar Amanzholov

#### What's great

The autoposting feature completely changed my workflow. I no longer have to worry about publishing at the right time—it handles everything automatically

#### What needs improvement [...] Ulykbek Asylbek

#### What's great

Keeping a consistent publishing loop on X is incredibly time consuming, especially when you are trying to balance actual building with audience growth. Vetta-X completely streamlines this pipeline. What makes it fantastic is its ability to generate content drafts that do not sound like generic, robotic AI templates. It actually respects the creator's unique voice and formatting preferences, which is extremely rare for growth tools in this niche. The dashboard UI is also incredibly clean and has zero unnecessary clutter.

#### What needs improvement [...] #### vs Alternatives

I looked into several other AI writing assistants and generic social media schedulers before finding this. Most of them either just queue up posts without giving you intelligent content suggestions, or their AI output sounds so artificial that it actually hurts your engagement rates on X. I chose Vetta-X over those alternative solutions because it is highly specialized for X's specific algorithm and community culture, offering a much tighter integration between content generation, scheduling, and brand consistency.

results.title: Pulldog | A macOS client to review code
results.content: | Title | Smart queries | --- | | Last chance to review | PR approvals > X AND pipeline status is "succeed" | | Old PRs | PR created date > X week(s) | | Today's PRs | PR created date > begin day AND PR created date < end day | | Feature team's PR | PR author name matching X, Y or Z | | Big PRs | PR status is open AND deleted lines > X | | Small PRs | PR status is open AND deleted lines < X | | Most discussed \Useful for tech lead or staff engineer | PR comments count > X | | Mines | PR author name matching X | | Mines that failed | PR author name matching X AND pipeline status is "failed" | | Reviewed by me | PR status is open AND Comment author name matching X | [...] Widgets ## Spotlight When someone ask you something from Slack or Teams you're always one click away from jumping right into it with spotlight indexation (requires macOS 26.0+) Apple provides an on-device model with 3 billion parameters, ask it to review your PRs. All is running locally no code is sent to a server, so feel free to use it even on sensible codebase at no extra-cost. You can even ask the model to make you a summary of the file as well as evaluating if PR should be approved as currently proposed. Review with Apple intelligence and there's more to discover. Give it a try today! [...] ## Matching selection Effortlessly understand where a variable is modified or where code is duplicated. ## Notifications Too much email noise ? May be not everything matters ? Subscribe only to channels that makes sense for you. When co-workers open, close, merge PRs or only when co-workers reply to your comments or update a PR you've already approved. Makes your mind free we take care of the rest to notify you. Get back control about events that occurs. Be notified only when you estimate it appropriate. Notifications ## Widgets One important aspect of being a native application is that you can be fully integrated into the platform. So widgets here we are! Keep an eye on your team work at anytime by putting your widgets directly on your Desktop or on your Notification Center.
